info.name: Oracle Database Oracle SODA (Simple Oracle Document Access) REST API
Collections
Oracle Database List all collections

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of collections to return

params.name: fromID
params.description: Start listing from this collection name (inclusive)

items.docs: Returns a list of collection names for the current database schema. Supports pagination through limit and fromID parameters.

info.name: Oracle Database Create a collection

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

items.docs: Creates a new document collection. This operation is idempotent - if the collection already exists, it returns 200 instead of 201. An optional request body can specify collection metadata configuration.

info.name: Oracle Database Delete a collection

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

items.docs: Deletes the entire collection and all documents it contains. This operation cannot be undone.

info.name: Metadata
Oracle Database Get collection catalog with metadata

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of collections to return

params.name: fromID
params.description: Start from this collection name (inclusive)

items.docs: Lists all collections in the schema with full metadata and navigation links. Each collection includes its properties and links to the collection itself and its JSON schema.

info.name: Oracle Database Get JSON schema for a collection

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

items.docs: Retrieves the JSON schema describing the document structure for the specified collection, including collection properties and column configurations.

info.name: Oracle Database List available custom actions

items.docs: Returns a list of available custom actions for SODA collections.

info.name: Documents
Oracle Database Get documents from a collection

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of documents to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of documents to skip (default 0)

params.name: fields
params.description: Control which fields are returned

params.name: totalResults
params.description: Include total count in response (may be slow on large collections)

params.name: fromID
params.description: Start after this key (ascending order)

params.name: toID
params.description: Stop before this key (descending order)

params.name: since
params.description: Only return documents modified after this timestamp

params.name: until
params.description: Only return documents modified before this timestamp

params.name: q
params.description: QBE filter specification as a JSON object

items.docs: Retrieves documents from the specified collection with optional filtering, pagination, and field selection. Supports Query by Example (QBE) filter specifications via the q parameter.

info.name: Oracle Database Insert a new document

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

items.docs: Inserts a new JSON document into the collection with a server-assigned key. Returns the generated key, etag, and timestamps in the response.

info.name: Oracle Database Insert or replace document (no key in URL)

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

items.docs: Inserts or replaces a document. Used with client-assigned keys included in the document body.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a document by key

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

params.name: key
params.description: The unique key of the document

items.docs: Retrieves a single document from the collection by its unique key. Supports conditional retrieval via If-Modified-Since and If-None-Match headers.

info.name: Oracle Database Replace or insert a document by key

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

params.name: key
params.description: The unique key of the document

items.docs: Replaces an existing document or inserts a new one at the specified key. Used for client-assigned keys.

info.name: Oracle Database Patch a document using JSON Patch

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

params.name: key
params.description: The unique key of the document

items.docs: Updates a document using the JSON Patch specification (RFC 6902). The request body must contain an array of patch operations.

info.name: Oracle Database Delete a document by key

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

params.name: key
params.description: The unique key of the document

items.docs: Deletes a single document from the collection by its unique key.

info.name: Queries
Oracle Database Query collection with QBE filter

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of documents to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of documents to skip

params.name: fields
params.description: Control which fields are returned

items.docs: Queries the collection using a Query by Example (QBE) filter specification in the request body. Returns matching documents with optional pagination. This endpoint is equivalent to /{collection}/?action=query.

info.name: Bulk Operations
Oracle Database Bulk insert documents

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

items.docs: Inserts multiple documents into the collection in a single operation. Documents are provided as a JSON array. Server-assigned keys are generated for each document.

info.name: Oracle Database Bulk delete documents by filter

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

items.docs: Deletes multiple documents matching a QBE filter specification. Returns the count of deleted documents.

info.name: Oracle Database Truncate all documents from collection

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

items.docs: Removes all documents from the collection without deleting the collection itself. This is faster than deleting documents one by one or with a filter.

info.name: Oracle Database Bulk update documents by filter

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

items.docs: Updates multiple documents matching a QBE filter using JSON Patch operations specified in the $patch field of the request body.

info.name: Indexes
Oracle Database Create a collection index

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

items.docs: Creates an index on the specified collection based on the SODA index specification provided in the request body.

info.name: Oracle Database Drop a collection index

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the SODA collection

items.docs: Drops the specified index from the collection.
